title: simple godzilla mod
description: a very basic mod that adds some godzilla kaiju (will add every kaiju one day)
body:
**i dont own godzilla. credit to toho and legendary.**
the repost of my own mod. this mod attempts to add kaiju from the godzilla universe, currently three, but will add all kaiju one day, none of them are accesible in survival yet so dont play it in survival.
